2026-06-02HCCanadian Centre on Substance Abuse ActAppointment of a director of the Board of Directors of the Canadian Centre on Substance AbuseAppointment of Isabelle Fortier of Verdun, Quebec, to be a director of the Board of Directors of the Canadian Centre on Substance Abuse, to hold office during pleasure for a term of three years.N/A
act: Canadian Centre on Substance Abuse Act
subject: Appointment of a director of the Board of Directors of the Canadian Centre on Substance Abuse
precis: Appointment of Isabelle Fortier of Verdun, Quebec, to be a director of the Board of Directors of the Canadian Centre on Substance Abuse, to hold office during pleasure for a term of three years.
